regions.text: Even the simplest living organism is far more complex than any machines men have made. Organisms are built up of parts which are the most complex things chemistry knows.
Chemistry is about the different ways in which materials are built up. For example: Water is made up of oxygen and hydrogen (H2O). Carbon dioxide is carbon and oxygen (CO2).
Chemists use formulas to represent the structure of all material things. formula: chemists’ way of representing structures.
